forecast_gate_command: taskset -c 0-3 env JAX_ENABLE_X64=true XLA_PYTHON_CLIENT_PREALLOCATE=false PYTHONPATH=src:proofs/v040:. python proofs/v040/run_forecast_gate_24h.py --hours 24 --case-id 20260429_18z_l2_72h_20260524T204451Z --case-id 20260521_18z_l3_24h_20260522T133443Z --out proofs/v040/forecast_gate_postfix_raw.json --output-root /tmp/v040_forecast_gate_postfix_mu_fix
gpu_resource_check: nvidia-smi before run showed only desktop/UI processes; the gate ran as the only Python compute process.

assessment.summary: The BC-conditional MU continuity fix is savepoint-correct, but this 24h standalone forecast gate remains STABLE_BUT_CORE_FIELD_MISMATCH. PSFC and U10 h2+ worst biases are essentially unchanged or worse versus the pre-fix baseline, so the diagnosed standalone bias did not collapse in the production forecast gate.
assessment.next_lead: Instrument real forecast savepoints across acoustic advance_mu_t -> small_step_finish -> end-step boundary apply and compare against WRF at h1/h2; the residual is likely outside the isolated advance_mu_t loop bounds or in another production coupling path affecting PGF/surface winds.

20260429_18z_l2_72h_20260524T204451Z.case_note: 20260429 uses the scored L2/backfill d01 case because the same-date L3 oracle does not contain the t0 CPU reference required by run_forecast_gate_24h.py.
